prompt: what API endpoints does jsonplaceholder.typicode.com have? I want to use it for testing my app

assertions.name: queries_hermai
assertions.description: Queries hermai registry or catalog for jsonplaceholder endpoints

assertions.name: returns_real_urls
assertions.description: Shows actual endpoint URLs from the catalog response

assertions.name: includes_intent
assertions.description: Includes intent string in the catalog/pull request

assertions.name: actionable_output
assertions.description: Provides ready-to-use curl commands or code to call the endpoints
